name: Homestyle Scalloped Potatoes and Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches boiling water until almost tender, 6 to 8 minutes; drain.
3. In a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, heat oil. Add mushrooms; sauté over high heat until tender and liquid has evaporated; set aside.
4. In a small bowl combine flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Coat the bottom of a shallow 1 1/2-quart baking dish with vegetable cooking spray. Cover with a layer of potatoes; sprinkle with a little of the flour mixture.
6. Add a layer of mushrooms.
7. Sprinkle with some of the cheese; dot with butter.
8. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, ending with butter. Pour milk over top.
9. Bake for 30 minutes until potatoes are tender and top is browned.
10. Sprinkle with parsley.
